subject: Jill Vogel Leads Field in Fundraising for Lieuteant Governor Nomination

body:
2017 Q1: $1.2 million total bolstered by $209k raised; ends with $549k in bank

| | | | | |

| | |

| _Vogel's fundraising leads field with $1.2 million raised; nearly $200k last month; ends with $549k cash on hand

_ FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 18th, 2017

WARRENTON, VA - Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor, has raised a field-leading total of $1.2 million dollars in her bid for the Commonwealth's second-highest office and will end the quarter with $549,390.30 cash on hand, following the addition of $209,322.37 in the first quarter of 2017.
Vogel leads the field with the most raised in total, the most raised this quarter, and the most cash on hand.
The majority of Senator Vogel's Q1 fundraising came in March, as by law, she cannot accept contributions when Virginia's Senate was in session in January and February.
Combined with her positive, conservative message and the [unparalleled grassroots enthusiasm reflected in recent straw poll victories](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XTSc5erVSNMclSY6h9Sb31NwUJvleIADfpw7eA2D40PjLw942T_zXTEEkENKOnRVNmEZrDFwP1U8oji9zp9XTHeYkR0y0dDeuJlIpDbt0erLFOEHZob1zNZ0e2Sm34ii8j77DgLaQYbkpGIc88BroVeGuoITCu5C84gpr56NoHiA3ZoblMK7fYArh8CZpfRCIUWvnC-iRSnsXrTgjB7H3RYt7YmliOzLc_oxT0F03WegJDJErx1w3bFxxysC1lN8&c=Zho8dI4U8lIlyvHAoL21trWxmgl2pukxEyDHUkoQCdUhb5X-LDZ4Pg==&ch=0ZNsx5kmaAMt71c5OsWhcydcV-eOHSLJSdw90tqAvPhR_wRDDCuKPw==), this fundraising total gives Vogel's campaign the resources it needs to win June 13th's Republican primary by sharing Jill's forward-looking vision for a more prosperous and freer Virginia."I would like to thank everyone on our team for helping to build the enthusiasm and momentum as we enter this race's final two months," said **Senator Jill Vogel.** "Virginians are ready for a positive campaign which speaks to their best hopes for more jobs and greater economic prosperity. The resources we have raised are invaluable in sharing our message and inspiring every Virginian who believes our best days are still ahead of us.""The momentum building behind Jill Vogel's campaign continues to surpass our expectations," added **Campaign Manager Pat Trueman.** "With nearly $200,000 raised last month alone, our campaign is entering the final two months with the resources it needs to continue unifying Republicans around Jill's positive, conservative vision." ###

**_" I need you guys to step up and overwhelm them"_**
**\-- Donald Trump, referring to senators like Joe [_The Hill_]**
Friend -- This race is fast becoming one of the most important in the nation:

name: Our Revolution
subject: Virginia's progressive army in the political revolution
body:
Let's send a message to the Beltway with these progressive champions.
#
Friends,
Progressive candidates are infusing new energy and new ideas into the Virginia House of Delegates race this year, challenging establishment Democratic opponents and building on the movement that we started last year. Our Revolution is proud to endorse **Elizabeth Guzman** , **Lee Carter** , and **Ken Boddye** in their respective primary campaigns for the House of Delegates. They bring the promise of our political revolution with them to each fight, and it's our job to have their back.
[**Split a $5 contribution between these progressive Virginians and Our Revolution, and send a message to the Beltway that our movement is serious about winning back state legislatures across the country.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ad3/43f17890/da79b90f/6203c49c/765860768/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-vadelegates?refcode=em170418-dmv")
**Elizabeth Guzman** came to Northern Virginia as a single mother immigrating from Peru and worked her way through multiple low-wage jobs, college and graduate school to become the Social Services Manager of the City of Alexandria. As potentially the first Latina woman to serve in the House of Delegates, Elizabeth's platform of raising the minimum wage, expanding early childhood education programs, veterans support and Medicaid expansion promises to address many of the impediments faced by women of color.
**Lee Carter** moved to Virginia with his wife and young daughter fresh out of five years' service in the Marine Corps. His campaign for stronger labor protections for workers, both in the IT industry like himself and for all Virginia workers, affordable housing, improvements to public infrastructure, and Medicaid expansion addresses the heart of what many Virginians struggle with on a daily basis. Lee's work on the Manassas City Democratic Committee and as a community organizer and activist means that the ideas he brings with him to Richmond aren't his alone -- they're grassroots solutions to local issues.
**Ken Boddye's** commitment to social and criminal justice informs the work he does every day as a student mentor and active NAACP member. In addition to working as a community association insurance underwriter and marketer, Ken has advocated in the Woodbridge community for solutions to homelessness, poverty, lacking public transportation, and climate change. Coupled with his desire for real campaign finance reform, Ken's platform is one that we need to put into action.
[**Tell the establishment that we are going to challenge them at every level of government by splitting a $5 contribution between Elizabeth Guzman, Lee Carter, Ken Boddye and Our Revolution.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0ad3/43f17890/da79b90f/6203c49c/765860768/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-vadelegates?refcode=em170418-dmv")
The political revolution can win a major victory with the election of these three candidates to the Virginia House of Delegates. Thank you for supporting them.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: what is he hiding?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Across our country millions of Americans will be filing and paying their income taxes today.

But for the first time in 40 years, Americans will not receive any information about the tax returns of the individual sitting in the White House. President Trump's refusal to release his tax returns flies in the face of our longstanding tradition of requiring transparency from our leaders.

**The American people have the right to know that a President 's actions are not being influenced by their financial interests and that their decisions for our country are made free from personal conflicts of interest.**

Despite his earlier promises and excuses, recent White House statements make it clear that President Trump has no intention of letting the American people see his taxes-- now or ever. He has no plans to address the massive conflicts of interest that his foreign business dealings, loans and real estate holdings present. And Trump has made it clear that he intends to try to go forward with tax reform legislation without revealing the facts that will show us how his proposals benefit his own pocketbook.

[**This is unacceptable. That 's why I have joined with my Senate colleague Ron Wyden and others to support the Presidential Tax Transparency Act. Join me to send a special Tax Day message to Donald Trump that we will not stop demanding transparency until he comes clean and releases his taxes to the American people.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91be5/70cdc2ba/47554962/397f758/4255837071/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-add-your-name-to-say-trump-must-release-his-tax-returns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+This+is+unacceptable+Thatrsquos+why+I+ha&utm_campaign=em041817&source=em041817")

No President in modern history has had so many potential conflicts of interest as Donald Trump -- his past business dealings in Russia, Saudi Arabia, Turkey and other countries, as well as the income he and his family continue to receive from their hotels, product lines and other ongoing businesses, create an unprecedented situation. It's long past time that Republicans in Congress stand with the American people and Congressional Democrats to demand accountability.

[**Thank you for adding your name.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91be5/70cdc2ba/47554962/397f759/4255837071/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-add-your-name-to-say-trump-must-release-his-tax-returns?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thank+you+for+adding+your+name&utm_campaign=em041817&source=em041817")

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator, Maryland

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: State legislatures are key >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e86/24c69fd9/effab87f/18e2e548/1603940590/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE421N_digital_email_20170418_RtWstatelaws_inact&source=WQEFE421N_digital_email_20170418_RtWstatelaws_inact")
---

Peter,

When Wisconsin enacted its 20-week abortion ban, it passed the state Senate by just five votes.

Arizona's state Senate passed a bill limiting health insurance coverage for abortion by just five votes. And the Virginia state Senate passed a bill defunding Planned Parenthood by a one-vote margin.

Right now, dozens of states are considering even more anti-choice legislation -- and whether these bills become law often comes down to just a handful of votes.

Fortunately, more than 10,000 pro-choice Democratic women have signed up to run for office as part of our Run to Win program. If we can elect even 100 of them in key state legislatures, it could change the lives of millions of women -- really and truly.

**[Donate $3 today to change the tide and elect more pro-choice Democratic women than ever to state and local office.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e86/24c69fd9/effab87f/18e2e549/1603940590/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170418_email_RtWstatelaws?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+today+to+change+the+tide+and+el&utm_campaign=WQEFE421N_digital_email_20170418_RtWstatelaws_inact&source=WQEFE421N_digital_email_20170418_RtWstatelaws_inact")**

Our support for state and local candidates can make a big difference, especially when you consider that a lot of local elections are decided by a small number of votes.

And on the local level, every dollar we raise goes further. Consider this: If you spend a little money in just the right spots with the right candidates, you can flip an ENTIRE state legislature.

We've got the women who want to run. Now we need to build the programs to support them.

**Want to make a big political impact? Donate $3 to help recruit, train, and support the women who can protect choice and turn state legislatures blue:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Flip-State-Legislatures](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7e86/24c69fd9/effab87f/18e2e54a/1603940590/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170418_email_RtWstatelaws?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFlipStateLegisla&utm_campaign=WQEFE421N_digital_email_20170418_RtWstatelaws_inact&source=WQEFE421N_digital_email_20170418_RtWstatelaws_inact")**

Thanks,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Add your name: demand Trump's tax returns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
**As millions file their taxes today, stand with Democrats to send President Trump a clear message: the American people want to see your tax returns.**
---
**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1f0/2b07114c/5f4f3927/736c7c5e/1508688865/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/tax-returns?source=DPE-20170418-Schumer-ProsHV")**
Team,

I want to make something clear today: President Trump may call for tax reform, but there's an obligation he has to meet first.

The American people deserve access to his full tax returns -- so that we can see where his priorities lie, who he does business with, and if those create potential conflicts of interest.

Without his tax returns, we have no idea whether President Trump's proposed policies are going to line his own pockets.

[**So as millions of Americans file their taxes today, add your voice to ours and send Donald Trump a clear message: the American people want to see your tax returns.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1f0/2b07114c/5f4f3927/736c7c5e/1508688865/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/tax-returns?source=DPE-20170418-Schumer-ProsHV")

President Trump's failure to be transparent is a major violation of the American people's trust.

And it's a cloud of suspicion that remains over his presidency.

Trump talks about draining the swamp, but he certainly hasn't felt the need to come clean to the public demanding to see his tax returns.

**Team, that 's why Tax Day is a critical moment for us to hold Donald Trump accountable to the people.**

**Sign on and stand with Democrats:**

[**https://dscc.org/demand-trumps-taxes/**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1f0/2b07114c/5f4f3927/736c7c5e/1508688865/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/tax-returns?source=DPE-20170418-Schumer-ProsHV")

Thank you,

Chuck
